channel.title: Phi on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Phi on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: Jamba Reasoning 3B vs Phi-4-mini-reasoning: Which Small Reasoning Model Should You Run Locally?
item.description: Jamba Reasoning 3B vs Phi-4-mini-reasoning: architecture, benchmarks, context length, RAM requirements, and which small reasoning model to run locally.

item.title: How to Run Phi-4-mini-reasoning Locally: Microsoft's 3.8B Math Model
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Phi-4-mini-reasoning locally with Ollama and llama.cpp: Microsoft's 3.8B model that outscores 7B distillation models on AIME and MATH-500.

item.title: Qwen3.5-4B vs Phi-4-mini: Choosing the Right 4B Model for Local Inference
item.description: Qwen3.5-4B vs Phi-4-mini: a direct comparison of benchmarks, VRAM, context windows, and multimodal support for the two best 4B local models in 2026.

item.title: How to Run Phi-4-mini Locally: Microsoft's 3.8B Model with 128K Context
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Phi-4-mini locally with Ollama, llama.cpp, and Python — with verified benchmarks and RAM requirements for Microsoft's 3.8B reasoning model.

item.title: Out of the Cloud, Into the Wild: How Small AI Models and Physical AI Are Taking Over the Edge
item.description: Why the AI industry is pivoting from massive data centers to Small Language Models (SLMs) running locally on devices, factories, and 5G networks.
